risk_title: Political and Governance Risk - High Rating Persistent
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as 'High' in the current SORT assessment, indicating ongoing fragility in the operating environment that could affect project implementation and sustainability of government-led service delivery systems.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 014 - 22 Jan 2024: High

risk_title: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability - Moderate Risk
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability is rated as 'Moderate,' suggesting potential challenges in government institutions' ability to sustain project activities and service delivery systems after project closure, particularly given the governance fragility context.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 014 - 22 Jan 2024: Moderate

risk_title: Handover and Sustainability Risks in Conflict-Affected Regions
risk_summary: Project activities in Tigray and Amhara regions (fish hatcheries construction) may face implementation and handover challenges due to these regions' recent conflict history and governance fragility, affecting the ability to properly transfer assets to regional government bureaus.
evidence_quote: Supporting fish hatcheries construction & equipment supply in Amhara and Tigray regions. The mission has outlined several follow-up actions for the project team, including: completing infrastructure development... and properly handover to the respected regional government bureaus
